hook: Before you buy your first stock, know what this term is really telling you.

slides.text: Before you buy your first stock, know what this term is really telling you.
slides.visual: Use assets/logos/logo.png exactly as supplied, topic title, and one clean visual cue.

slides.text: You see dividend on an app, a post, or a portfolio screenshot, but you are not sure whether it actually helps your decision.
slides.visual: Show a relatable young investor decision with simple labels and large mobile-readable text.

slides.text: Dividend is a lens for understanding a business or market idea, not a green signal to buy anything.
slides.visual: Use a plain-English explainer card with one idea only.

slides.text: If two companies are in your watchlist, do not use one metric alone. Combine it with debt, growth, cash flow, and your overall portfolio risk.
slides.visual: Use a practical example card with portfolio, SIP, risk, or Rs 10,000 decision framing.

slides.text: Use dividend as a decision filter, not as a shortcut.
slides.visual: Use a strong one-line takeaway with accent highlight.

slides.text: Follow UNLOAN for one market term at a time.
slides.visual: Show CTA, disclaimer, tagline "Build Wealth. Not Debt.", and assets/logos/logo.png without editing the logo.

cta: Follow UNLOAN for one market term at a time.

compliance.disclaimer: Educational content only. This is not financial advice.
